name: Omise (Opn)
description: Omise (Opn) — Southeast Asia payment gateway covering Thailand, Japan, and Singapore with cards, PromptPay, and installment support.

seo.title: Omise (Opn) — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Omise (Opn): Omise (Opn) — Southeast Asia payment gateway covering Thailand, Japan, and Singapore with cards, PromptPay, and installment support.

when_to_use: Accepting PromptPay QR payments for Thai e-commerce
Card + installment checkout for Southeast Asian merchants
Recurring billing for subscription apps in Thailand and Japan
Embedding hosted payment page for Singapore marketplace sellers

pros: Strong SEA coverage: Thailand, Japan, Singapore
Modern API with decent developer docs
cons: Rebrand to Opn caused some confusion
Pricing less competitive than Stripe globally
review.verdict: Credible SEA payment gateway with clean APIs — strong pick for Thailand and Japan coverage.
review.best_for: SEA merchants needing Thailand, Japan, and Singapore coverage
review.not_for: Global merchants or teams outside SEA

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
